title: KISHKANU v0.1.1 - Quantum Antibiotic Resistance Enzyme Scanner

results.biological_implications: QUANTUM-CRITICAL: Antibiotic resistance mechanism in TEM-1 Beta-Lactamase fundamentally depends on quantum tunneling. This enzyme uses proton/electron tunneling to accelerate antibiotic inactivation by 9.9x. New drug design MUST account for quantum effects; classical inhibitor strategies will fail.

This enzyme uses proton/electron tunneling to accelerate antibiotic inactivation by 9.9x. New drug design MUST account for quantum effects; classical inhibitor strategies will fail.
